title: Facility Roster Schema
description: JSON Schema for facility roster validation

message.enum: Invalid PDM Transaction Type, must be one of the following: New, Add to Plan, Add to Network, Add to Group, Add Role, Add Specialty, Add Location, Add Enrollment, Add Contract, Add Termination

pdmTransactionTypeEventDate.title: PDM Transaction Type Event Date
pdmTransactionTypeEventDate.description: Event date for PDM transaction type

message.format: Incorrect date format. Supported date format: YYYY-MM-DD

metadata.npiCheckErrorMessage: NPI couldn't be validated with NPPES

message.pattern: Must be exactly 10 characters in length
Must be exactly 9 characters in length

facilityExternalId.title: Facility External ID
facilityExternalId.description: External identifier for facility. Required when tenant is configured to use External ID for facility uniqueness. Must be unique per Facility NPI, Tenant ID, and Facility TIN combination.

conditionallyRequired.message: Facility External ID is required when tenant is configured to use External ID for facility uniqueness

message.type: Facility External ID is required when tenant is configured to use External ID for facility uniqueness

facilityType.title: Facility Type
enum: Intermediate Care Facility for Individuals with Intellectual Disabilities (ICF/IID)

message.enum: Invalid Facility Type, must be one of the valid facility types

statesToCredential.description: States to credential the practitioner for

isFacilityFederallyQualifiedHealthCenter.description: Whether the facility is a federally qualified health center

delegationStatus.description: Credentialing delegation status of the facility

lineOfBusiness.description: Line of business for the facility

jurisdictionOfInterest.title: Jurisdiction of Interest
jurisdictionOfInterest.description: Jurisdiction of interest for the facility

udfUSTHCreationDate.description: USTH creation date of the facility

State License Expiration Date must be a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD)

message.pattern: DEA number must be 9 characters: 2 letters followed by 7 digits (e.g., AB1234567)

metadata.errorMessage: DEA Expiration Date must be a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD)

message.format: Incorrect date format. Supported date format: YYYY-MM-DD

metadata.errorMessage: Controlled Substance Number must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters
Controlled Substance State must be a valid state abbreviation
Controlled Substance Expiration Date must be a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD)

message.format: Incorrect date format. Supported date format: YYYY-MM-DD

metadata.errorMessage: CLIA Certificate Number must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters
CLIA Certificate Expiration Date must be a valid date

message.format: Incorrect date format. Supported date format: YYYY-MM-DD

X-Ray License Expiration Date must be a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD)

message.format: Incorrect date format. Supported date format: YYYY-MM-DD

metadata.errorMessage: Primary Facility Accreditation must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters
Additional Facility Accreditation must be 5-20 alphanumeric characters

Malpractice Coverage Claim Amount must be a valid number
Malpractice Coverage Aggregrate Amount must be a valid number

Malpractice Coverage End Date must be a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD)
